result: F-HOLO-10 (CAPSTONE, thesis-confirming): end-to-end learning THROUGH rotor_holonomy CORRUPTS it (trainable-W1 0.513, chance) while FREEZING the fixed op + learning the readout WORKS (frozen-W1 0.968); generic-MLP 0.541, fixed-commutator 1.000. FD gate 6.3e-5 (not a phantom). => designed op FIXED, learn ON TOP not THROUGH.

NEGATIVE_RESULT_REQUIRING_A_GUARD: do NOT deploy an end-to-end trained rotor stack on non-abelian tasks - fix the holonomy op, learn a readout
novelty_classification.note: Operationally confirms the exact/designed>learned thesis; completes the arc.

components_added_or_updated: demonstrated rotor_holonomy as a differentiable core layer (composed closed-form backward, FD-gated 6.3e-5) - trainable but should be used FIXED
guards_added: non-abelian deploy pattern: fixed rotor_holonomy + learned readout, NOT end-to-end trained rotor stack

source_changes: examples/noncommute_learned.rs (NEW: HoloNet end-to-end, composed closed-form backward, FD gate, trainable/frozen arms)

gates.capstone: designed op must stay FIXED: frozen-W1 0.968 vs trainable-W1 0.513; both > generic-MLP only when frozen
gates.fd_gate: 6.3e-5 PASS (gradient correct - failure is optimization not phantom)

integrity_note: FD gate proves the trainable-W1 failure is genuine optimization, not a gradient bug; frozen-W1 is the discriminating test localizing it to the trainable pre-composition. Not forced.
honest_scope: one non-abelian task; unconstrained-linear W1 (a rotor-manifold W1 untested); the fixed-op-wins finding stands regardless.
next_experiment_authorized: real pose-graph SLAM loop-closure consistency (SE(3) holonomy, g2o) with the FIXED rotor_holonomy + learned readout pattern - now justified and prescribed by F-HOLO-9/10.
next_experiment_proposal: acquire a standard g2o pose-graph benchmark (sphere2500/torus/garage), compute per-loop SE(3) holonomy residuals (fixed op), learn a lightweight outlier/consistency readout, vs classical chi-square baselines - the real-data validation of the now-characterized pattern.
